response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct musical performances. 2. Identified first song as '夢色フェスティバル' featuring Sakura Miko and Nakiri Ayame. Transcribed parts of lyrics from on-screen text as search results were inconclusive for this specific song/artist combination. 3. Identified second song as '恥ずかしいか青春は' featuring Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, and Oozora Subaru. Searched for '恥ずかしいか青春は' lyrics, found accurate match. 4. Constructed final JSON with all requirements.
response.global_summary: A performance featuring VTubers Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, and Oozora Subaru. The video consists of two distinct musical performances, with Sakura Miko and Nakiri Ayame performing the first song, and all three performing the second song together.

scenes.description: Sakura Miko and Nakiri Ayame perform the song '夢色フェスティバル'. The performance takes place in a brightly colored, festive stage setting with pink and white decorations.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
夢のビートきざもうよ
たきこれてく！夢色フェスティバル！
(Lyrics transcribed from performance)
...[Song lyrics continue throughout]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's beat out the rhythm of our dreams!
It's overflowing! Yumeiro Festival!
(Lyrics transcribed from performance)
...[Song lyrics continue throughout]

scenes.description: Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, and Oozora Subaru perform the song '恥ずかしいか青春は'. The stage lighting changes to a more dramatic blue and dark theme, and the performers are in new outfits.
scenes.performer_in_video: Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, Oozora Subaru
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぶつけたところから熟れていく果実のように
僕らは些細なことでへこたれたよな
息せき切ってがむしゃらに
輝く一等星をめがけて手を伸ばしたよな
繊細されど大胆だ
うるさい これが切り札だ
泣き虫されど熱血だ
うるさい これが持ち味だ
未開拓冒険地帯∴好奇心旺盛時代
何が綺麗かは分かる 見る目ならばある
恥ずかしいか青春は
馬鹿らしいか真剣は
僕ら全力でやってんだ
振りかざせ存在を 掻き乱せ心臓を
あとどれくらい続いていくだろう
守り抜いた青春が
何よりもの贅沢だ
きっといつか焦がれ思い返す
名前のない関係を 捨てきれない感情を
何気ない今日を忘れないでね
心は素直のようだ
戦友だとか親友は
うるさい どれも正解だ
初恋だとか失恋は
うるさい どれも宝石だ
天才的人生企画≒問題集対抗美学
君はなにしてんのかな 話がしたい
風に乗って青春が
この想いを運んだ
僕ら全力を越えたいんだ
立ちすくむ同士だって 引き連れていこうぜ
この上ない今日を過ごしていたいよ
今しかできない事がある
今しかできない恋がある
今しかできないから
僕らに託された時間が惜しい
今しか見られない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like a fruit that ripens from the place where it was hit
We got discouraged by trivial things, didn't we
Breathing hard and recklessly
We reached out our hands aiming for the shining first-magnitude star
Delicate, yet bold
Noisy, this is our trump card
Crybaby, yet hot-blooded
Noisy, this is our specialty
Unexplored adventure zone... Curiosity thriving era
We know what is beautiful, we have an eye for it
Is youth embarrassing?
Is seriousness ridiculous?
We are doing our best
Brandish your existence
Disturb your heart
How much longer will this continue
The youth we protected
Is the greatest luxury of all
Surely someday we will yearn for it and look back on it
The nameless relationship
The feelings we cannot throw away
Please don't forget this casual day
It seems our hearts are honest
Comrades or best friends
Noisy, all of them are correct
First love or heartbreak
Noisy, all of them are gems
Genius life plan... Problem set competition aesthetics
What are you doing?
I want to talk
Youth rode the wind
And carried this feeling
We want to surpass our best
Let's take along our friends who are standing still
I want to spend this unparalleled day with you
There are things you can only do now
There is love you can only do now
Because you can only do it now
The time entrusted to us is precious
What you can only see now
